candidates.item: JMI product engineering team delivered Network Analysis and Operations, Energy Management & Lighting Control systems as a turn-key solution from their development centres in USA and India. These are hosted by JMI and offered as a SaaS solution to over twenty five active utility customers around the World.
candidates.why_interesting: An IT services/consulting firm that also owns and operates its own SaaS product — a smart energy-management and lighting-control platform actively serving 25+ utility customers globally — is genuinely unusual. Most IT services companies are pure services businesses with no proprietary hosted product at all, let alone one running live with paying utility clients worldwide.
candidates.as_of_date_if_known: unknown (page current as of mid-2026 crawl)
candidates.recency_note: Live on homepage; no date stamp, but phrased in present tense with active customer count cited

candidates.item: JMI Property Smart Grid™ solution provides a modular energy management system complete with smart devices and web-based software to monitor property and portfolio electricity, gas & oil, water, and HVAC systems.
candidates.why_interesting: Beyond the utility SaaS, JMI has a trademarked physical+software product ('Property Smart Grid™') targeting hotels and commercial real estate — a branded IoT hardware+cloud offering from a firm that presents itself primarily as an IT services/consulting company. The trademark and the hotel-sector targeting (monitoring RevPAR impact of energy costs) is a very specific, non-generic product identity most IT consulting shops don't have.
candidates.as_of_date_if_known: unknown (page current as of mid-2026 crawl)
candidates.recency_note: Live on their industry page; no explicit date

candidates.item: Prior to starting JMI, Shawn was instrumental in implementing various Banking and Investment Banking products and solutions for organizations like Citigroup and Goldman Sachs.
candidates.why_interesting: The co-founder/CEO came out of Goldman Sachs and Citigroup as an enterprise architect before building a minority-owned IT firm in 1997 — an unusual origin story that explains JMI's Financial Research & Analysis practice area (a full practice line rarely seen at a general IT services firm of this size).
candidates.recency_note: Stable biographical fact; unlikely to change

candidates.item: Jean Martin is an unfunded company based in New York City (United States), founded in 1997 by Shawn Kumar… Jean Martin has not raised any funding yet.
candidates.why_interesting: A ~2,500-person global IT firm across the US, India, Colombia, Japan, UAE, UK, Australia, Singapore — with 500+ clients and an estimated ~$79M revenue — that has taken zero outside funding in nearly 30 years is genuinely striking. Bootstrapped to this scale is a real differentiator worth noting.
candidates.recency_note: Tracxn page dated Oct 2025; Crunchbase also shows no funding rounds

candidates.item: NEW YORK, March 12, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Jean Martin Inc. (JMI), a global technology, research and analytics firm, announced the appointment of Kaushik Paul as Chief Revenue Officer, further strengthening its core leadership team. With a career spanning over 30 years in the Financial…
candidates.why_interesting: Hiring a dedicated CRO with 30+ years in financial services as recently as March 2024 signals an active growth push — concrete, recent, and a natural conversation hook about what commercial expansion looks like for the firm.
candidates.recency_note: PR Newswire press release dated March 12, 2024 — roughly 16 months ago
